name: Spanish Mountain Gold Ltd.
description: Spanish Mountain Gold Ltd. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the advancement of its flagship, 100%-owned Spanish Mountain gold project located in the Cariboo region of central British Columbia. The company is dedicated to the responsible development of this project, aiming to establish it as a significant gold mine. With a commitment to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) standards, the firm actively explores and evaluates its large land package to unlock the potential of the region while maintaining sustainable mining practices and fostering community engagement.
